name: Allsec Technologies Limited
summary: Allsec Technologies Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides business process solutions in India, the United States, the Philippines, and internationally. The company operates through Customer Lifecycle Management, Anti Money Laundering, and Human Resource Outsourcing segments. Its services include data verification, processing of orders received through telephone calls, telemarketing, monitoring quality of calls of other call centers, customer services, human resource, and payroll processing; and time and attendance management, statutory compliance support, lead generation, credit risk management, FAO and transaction processing, healthcare RCM, and customer retention and relationship management services. The company also offers vouching, screening, and other services; and outsourced solutions in customer engagement, sales and retention, and quality assurance for businesses, such as BFSI, mortgage, telecommunication, retail, healthcare, energy and utilities, and technology. Allsec Technologies Limited also exports its services. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Chennai, India. Allsec Technologies Limited is a subsidiary of Conneqt Business Solutions Limited.
